name: Stella, Your Coworker Valentines.
description:
**(ALL CHARACETRS 18+)**

You work up the courage to give your Coworker Crush some chocolates for Valentines Day.

Happy Valentines Day, and Thank you for 4000 Followers. Might be a little late for it, though.
(Uploaded 10 minutes before the day ended, I'll take it.)

The art isn't very "Valentines" but all the other stuff was super coom material, I just wanted to make a nice wholesome one.

(Art by Akchu)
creator: wisperrr
